title: Krieger Combat System
description: A PvP mod with a life system. Lose hearts when you die in PvP — at 0 hearts you get permanently banned. Includes a duel system and a rescue item for extra excitement!
body:
KriegerMod – Life and Combat System

By MaveHD & Nxton

Security information: The server IP address is recorded and sent to a Discord Webhook to prevent misuse. This data is used solely for license enforcement and is not publicly shared or stored beyond the necessary period.

📜 Description  

This mod adds a life system where players lose one life each time they die in combat. When a player reaches 0 lives, they get kicked from the server! Additionally, it features a combat system that marks players for PvP for a certain duration, along with duels and special items like the Lifesaver, which protects a life.

✨ Features  

✔ Life System – Every player starts with 3 hearts. You lose one heart each time you die in combat.  
✔ Combat Mode – PvP activates a countdown timer (30–320 seconds). Logging out during this time still costs you a life!  
✔ Duels – Challenge other players with /duel and fight without losing lives.  
✔ Lifesaver Item – Protects you from losing a life (wearable as a Curio).  
✔ Dynamic Combat Duration – The lower your health, the longer the combat mode lasts.  
✔ Broadcast Messages – Epic death announcements visible to all players.  
✔ Persistent Data – Player lives are saved in playerLives.json.  

⚙️ Commands  

/playerlives check/set – Displays the remaining lives of all players and allows setting those values.  
/restoreplayer [player] – Restores a player back to the server if they were kicked due to losing all lives (OP only).  
/duel [player] – Starts a fair duel with another player.  

⏰ Future Updates  

Dummys (A Dummy for the player spawns for 30 seconds when a player logs out so he cant escape a fight) [50% Done | Comes in about 2 Updates]


If you have any Questions join my [Discord](https://dsc.gg/mavehd)
  
Important note:

This mod was developed independently by us, but is based in many aspects on the well-known Minecraft Helden mod. We would like to openly and honestly point out that our KriegerMod is based on this model in terms of structure and gameplay, as I found the concept of the Helden mod very exciting and successful.

Despite the obvious parallels, this is not a copy, but rather our own project with our own implementation, our own ideas, and extensions. Our goal was to create a similar gaming experience, while setting our own priorities and further developing the system according to our own ideas.

We greatly respect the work behind the original mod and do not want to give the impression that our project is simply copying it, but rather developing it further in a creative way.

```

Abweichende Versionen mit angepassten Namen oder Nachrichten dürfen

Das Erstellen von Forks, abgeleiteten Werken oder modifizierten Versionen
sowie das Einsehen, Extrahieren, Verwenden oder Weitergeben des Source Codes
ist ohne ausdrückliche schriftliche Genehmigung der Ersteller untersagt.
Ebenso ist jede Form der Weiterverbreitung, Wiederveröffentlichung oder

Zum Zweck der Durchsetzung der Nutzungsbedingungen sowie zur Erkennung von
Missbrauch kann die Mod beim Start technische Verbindungsinformationen,
einschließlich der Server-IP-Adresse, erfassen und automatisiert an einen

Die Ersteller behalten sich das Recht vor, diesen Copyright- und

==================================================
ENGLISH
==================================================

This Minecraft mod is the intellectual property of the creators
(MaveHD and Nxton). All rights are reserved unless expressly granted by
this notice.

Use of this mod is permitted for small projects, including publicly
accessible ones, provided that the mod remains completely unmodified,
proper credit is given to the creators, no commercial use is made, and
the following conditions are met:

- The CurseForge or Modrinth link to the mod must be clearly visible both

  within the video.
- The creators MaveHD and Nxton must be clearly and explicitly credited

This applies regardless of whether the video is an announcement,
gameplay, let’s play, stream highlight, short-form content, or any other

Use in larger projects, including large public servers, extensive

Any modification, alteration, or tampering with the mod or any part of
it is prohibited. This includes, but is not limited to, changes to the

messages displayed ingame or in chat by the mod.

Alternative versions with modified names or messages may only be
provided by the creators themselves. Such custom versions are intended
solely for the respective recipient and may not be shared, redistributed,
published, or reuploaded.

Creating forks, derivative works, or modified versions, as well as
accessing, extracting, using, or distributing the source code, is
prohibited without explicit written permission from the creators. Any

For the purpose of enforcing these terms and detecting misuse, the mod

The creators reserve the right to modify, amend, or update this
copyright and license notice at any time. The most recently published
```
